title: Gold gains amid weak economic data
section_path: Gold gains amid weak economic data
section_path_text: Gold gains amid weak economic data
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Weak economic data weighed on sentiment across the commodity complex. The rally in oil also seemed to raise concerns for industrial metals. Gold rallied amid concerns over a global economic slowdown.
